description.value: A heavy SMG. Due to its size it can't be concealed. If you roll 1 on Attack (Crit fail) the gun jams and requires using an action to clear.
An Exotic Shotgun that uses the Heavy Weapons Skill. Refer to the full item description on pg. 348.

Used as a replacement for fighting or ranged weapon skills, excluding evasion. Note that this uses REF as a base for reasons involving initiative - set REF of the mook first, then consider that number when considering the Martial skill.

Can be applied to all vehicles. Adds a tank of nitrous oxide to the vehicle. Allows you to use your Action to use an additional Move Action while driving. 

You may install this upgrade multiple times, each upgrade adds an additional tank and each tank may be used once per day.

Can be applied to all vehicles except Bikes, Jetskis and Gyrocopters. One of the vehicles seats becomes a swivel mount for any two-handed ranged weapon. A passenger may fire the weapon using an Action. The passenger can reload the weapon. The weapon can be removed or reinstalled using an Action. 

The first time this upgrade is taken, included is a Tsunami Arms Helix,  Rhinemetall EMG-86 Railgun, or Militech "Cowboy" U-56 Grenade Launcher. If the vehicle has the Bulletproof Glass upgrade, the gunner is protected by the same glass. 

You may install this upgrade multiple times if the vehicle has the Housing Capacity upgrade. Requires Heavy Chassis.
If damage dealt to target they are set alight. Target takes 2 damage to HP at end of their turn unless they use action to extinguish flames. Does not stack.

A Malorian Arms market survey in 2043 revealed a gap in the average consumer's arsenal which they eagerly stepped in to exploit - a cheap, reliable, effective way to get a lot of mass downrange very quickly, without necessarily devastating its surroundings in the process. And thus, the harpoon cannon was born.

The Malorian Arms Harpoon Cannon is an exotic grenade launcher which is fired using the heavy weapons skill, but which uses the Handgun DV table. Using a combination of compressed air and magnetic propulsion, it fires proprietary Malorian harpoons which function as armor-piercing ammunition, and which can be retrieved for reuse once fired. Requires BODY 8 to be used effectively.

The cannon also works underwater!
Proprietary harpoons for the Malorian Arms cannon. These short-range monsters function as armor-piercing ammunition, and can be retrieved for reuse after being fired.

information.notes:
The Raffen buggy variant comes equipped with a weapon mount, a can of NOS, and a single seat upgrade, enters the scene with one of the three mounted guns listed above, and uses its REF to roll initiative for its occupants. The gun can be fired with the vehicle's martial or autofire skill, instead of the user's.

The Gatling Turret is only capable of autofire. If the harpoon connects, the Buggy grapples the target, requiring a DV17 BODY Athletics check to dislodge, and the harpoon cannon can't be reloaded until the harpoon is disconnected as an action. On a 1, the flamethrower explodes as an incendiary grenade.

3 seats. 25 MOVE / 125 MPH / 200 KPH top speed. 35 HP. Can mount terrain features of less than 24 IN/61 CM in height without needing to maneuver.

Tokens and Art by Solution. Redistributed with permission.
